bias.analyst: Pre-market: a small gap up into a normal regime; the broad-market tide is falling. Theo commits to nothing until the first 30 minutes classify the day.
bias.commentator: Team news: a small gap up on the schedule, a normal regime expected, away support falling. Lineups locked at 9:30 - the first half hour decides the game plan.

events.analyst: Theo Live is now public. From here on, session events appear in this feed with a delay - wins, losses, and the days we sit on our hands.
events.commentator: Welcome to the grounds! The gates are open for the first time. Pre-season record is on the board - including the losses. We hide nothing here, folks.
